scripts.build: rm -r dist || true && bun build-entry && bun build-window && cp Info.json dist/ && cp ui/preferences/index.html dist/preferences.html
scripts.build-window: echo 'import tailwindcss from "bun-plugin-tailwind"; await Bun.build({ entrypoints: ["ui/window/index.html"], outdir: "dist", target: "browser", compile: true, minify: true, plugins: [tailwindcss] });' | bun run - && mv dist/index.html dist/window.html
